docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-25-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-25-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF YANNIE WONG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SAFEWAY SUPER MARKET IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY WONG, YANNIE AS TO DEFENDANT SAFEWAY SUPERMARKET OR SAFEWAY, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-25-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-25-2021 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WONG, YANNIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAFEWAY SUPERMARKET OR SAFEWAY, INC. $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,545.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
